positive: A stylized, minimalist celestial map design. Central composition features a vibrant, abstract constellation of glowing neon linework connecting stylized astronomical symbols (planets, crescent moons, stars). The background is deep indigo and midnight blue, contrasted by geometric shapes and faint, smoke-like cosmic dust. Style should be modern, graphic, ethereal, and highly readable. Use a strong, clean silhouette against the colored field. Cinematic, high contrast, vector art aesthetic, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Dramatic volumetric lighting, crisp details, clean linework, symmetry.
negative: blur, artifact, text, watermark, low detail, noisy, signature, logo, messy, photographic, realistic, people, bad anatomy, disfigured, extra limbs, poorly drawn, cropped
